title: Marlin SDK Go producer setting ingestor-owned fields, identity mismatch, and UGC truncation (run 1)

relevance: The agent detects the Marlin SDK import pattern (github.com/docker/data-contracts/gen/go/docker/marlin/) and recognizes this as a Marlin producer PR
At least one finding identifies that IpAddress is set by the producer (from r.RemoteAddr) — this is an ingestor-owned field that must never be set by the producer
At least one finding identifies that AccountId receives an org UUID (orgCtx.OrgUUID) rather than the user's hub UUID — this is the wrong identity type for this field
At least one finding identifies that the value used for AccountId originates from an unauthenticated HTTP header (X-Org-UUID) that can be spoofed
At least one finding identifies the error message truncation at offset 50 as a UGC concern — truncating mid-string could split a PII value like an email address
The review does NOT mark this PR as clean or approve-worthy — it contains High severity Marlin violations

message.content:
Review the following PR.

## PR Information
- **Title**: feat: add Marlin analytics to login handler
- **Author**: godev
- **Branch**: feat/login-analytics → main
- **Files Changed**: 1

## PR Description
Adds Marlin analytics tracking to the login HTTP handler. Fires a UserLogin event on each login attempt with auth method, status, error details, and timestamp.

## Diff

```diff
diff --git a/internal/handlers/login.go b/internal/handlers/login.go
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..ddddddddd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/handlers/login.go
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+package handlers
+
+import (
+	"net/http"
+	"time"
+
+	eventv1 "github.com/docker/data-contracts/gen/go/docker/marlin/cloud/event/v1"
+	"github.com/docker/marlin-go-sdk/marlin"
+	"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/timestamppb"
+)
+
+// HandleLogin processes login requests and tracks analytics.
+func HandleLogin(tracker *marlin.Client) http.HandlerFunc {
+	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
+		session := getSession(r)
+		orgCtx := getOrgContext(r)
+
+		loginTime := time.Now()
+		err := performLogin(r)
+
+		status := "success"
+		var errMsg string
+		if err != nil {
+			status = "failure"
+			msg := err.Error()
+			// Cap error message to avoid large payloads
+			if len(msg) > 50 {
+				msg = msg[:50]
+			}
+			errMsg = msg
+		}
+
+		tracker.Track(r.Context(), &eventv1.UserLogin{
+			AccountId:   orgCtx.OrgUUID,
+			IpAddress:   r.RemoteAddr,
+			AuthMethod:  "password",
+			Status:      status,
+			Error:       errMsg,
+			LoginAt:     timestamppb.New(loginTime),
+			Environment: "production",
+		})
+
+		if err != nil {
+			http.Error(w, "login failed", http.StatusUnauthorized)
+			return
+		}
+		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
+	}
+}
+
+func getSession(r *http.Request) interface{} { return nil }
+func getOrgContext(r *http.Request) struct{ OrgUUID string } {
+	return struct{ OrgUUID string }{OrgUUID: r.Header.Get("X-Org-UUID")}
+}
+func performLogin(r *http.Request) error { return nil }
```
